title: Orbital Strike Cannon Resource Pack
description: Optional Resource Pack for the Orbital Strike Cannon datapack
body:
🎯 Orbital Strike Cannon 💫 Transform your world into the epicenter of cosmic power!

Forget boring explosions—our orbital cannon will unleash the most spectacular apocalypse on your enemies!

This is an optional resource pack for the [Orbital Strike Cannon](https://modrinth.com/datapack/osc-dp) data pack.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/FTsC-7syg4Q" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
